intent: Create a restrained cinematic mood with controlled contrast, muted color, and enough shadow detail to preserve atmosphere.

tone_guidance.brightness: slightly darker than neutral when the scene supports mood
tone_guidance.highlights: roll off bright lamps, sky, or reflections

color_guidance.white_balance: cooler or neutral unless warm practical lights are important
color_guidance.skin: protect from gray or green casts when people are present

parameter_strategy: Agent must infer concrete values per photo from preview analysis. Use this card as direction, not as a fixed preset.
